report.defect_summary: [Create Role][P0] Chinese input becomes ??? and blocks start
report.report_text:
Module: Training Center > Create Role
Suggested Priority: P0

Phenomenon:
- In black-box acceptance on 2026-03-27, Chinese text sent into the real role-creation API chain is stored as question marks.
- Session rcs-20260327-102534-c1fbb0 saved the user message as ????..., role_spec stayed empty, can_start=false.
- POST /api/training/role-creation/sessions/rcs-20260327-102534-c1fbb0/start returned 409 role_creation_spec_incomplete.
- In the same environment, an ASCII payload in session rcs-20260327-102733-1e2d4b succeeded and started real creation ticket asg-20260327-102824-8a62bd.

Expected Result:
- Chinese session_title and Chinese role profile text should be stored and parsed correctly.
- Chinese users should be able to start role creation without text corruption.

Actual Result:
- Chinese content is persisted as question marks and the role profile cannot be extracted.
- The role cannot enter start phase.

Impact:
- Real role creation is not reliable for Chinese input.
- This blocks production verification if operators describe role profile in Chinese.

Evidence:
- C:/work/J-Agents/Analyst/.test/role-creation-acceptance-20260327-102534/07-summary.json
- C:/work/J-Agents/Analyst/.test/role-creation-acceptance-20260327-102534/03-detail-after-message.json
- C:/work/J-Agents/Analyst/.test/role-creation-acceptance-20260327-102733/07-summary.json
